Apply Now

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about IRBF courses, fees, eligibility, placements, and centers.

Home / FAQs

Course Details

IRBF offers the PGCRBF (Post Graduate Certificate in Retail Banking & Finance) and PGCRBO (Post Graduate Certificate in Retail Banking Operations) programs, both delivered through live interactive sessions by ex-banker faculty.
Both core programs run for approximately 2 months with structured modules, mock interviews, and placement preparation.

Fees

Fee details vary by program and intake. Please contact our admissions team at +91 91721 55613 or info@irbfedu.com for the current fee structure and available installment options.
Yes, flexible installment plans are available. Speak with the admissions team to choose a plan that suits you.

Eligibility

Any graduate (typically aged 0-28 years) from any stream can apply. Fresh graduates aiming for a career in retail banking are the ideal fit.
No prior finance background is required. The curriculum is designed to take graduates from any discipline to job-ready banking professionals.

Placement Guarantee

Yes. IRBF provides 100% placement assistance, with 6,200+ graduates already placed across leading private sector banks.
Recruiters include Axis Bank, HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, Kotak Mahindra Bank, IDFC First Bank, Bandhan Bank, and many more leading private banks.

Training Centers

IRBF has offline centers and online counseling hubs across Maharashtra, including Thane, Pune, Mumbai, Nashik, Nagpur, Kolhapur, and more. See our State Centers page.
Programs are delivered through live online interactive sessions, with offline counseling support available at our centers.

Grooming university graduates into high-performing professional retail banking assets in Maharashtra.
